## Summary

Describe the problem and the approach taken.

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally
- [ ] New or changed behavior has focused tests where practical
- [ ] UI changes were checked on desktop and mobile

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated generated files
- [ ] Documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` are updated when needed
- [ ] No secrets, personal data, or vulnerable dependencies were introduced
